node.text: Andrew had a picnic with his girlfriend last Friday and enjoys being in nature.

node.text: Andrew is searching for a pet-friendly spot in the city but has not had luck so far.

node.text: Andrew is looking forward to the hike and for Toby to meet Audrey's pups.
